attributes.action: Stop Forestry England from charging for parking in all the New Forest car parks
attributes.additional_details: Forestry England  being a quango has not properly consulted and are ignoring the adverse issues so parliament should instruct them to take account of all the adverse effects before implementing and they should also consider if that body has sufficient Government funds allocated
attributes.background: Charging will cause many adverse problems for the environment and the economy locally

rejection.details:
We can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for.

Decisions about car parks are an operational matter for the Forestry Commission, not UK Government or Parliament.

You could contact the Forestry Commission about this matter.
